Localization.Description: An administrator logged in, logged out, or failed to log in

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The administrator {subject.account.name} failed to log in to the management console on host {event_src.host}
The administrator {subject.account.name} logged in to the management console on host {event_src.host}
The administrator {subject.account.name} logged out of the management console on host {event_src.host}
